utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each item requires the type of coverage and costs. The plan provides descriptions and explicit costs for each: health (physical and mental health insurance with costs) is specified with plan features and €165/month; property (home/contents insurance with costs) has description and €60/month; travel insurance with costs is described and €50/month; additional services with costs are listed with €0/month included; total_budget includes a description and a total €275/month. Thus, all items are fully specified with coverage descriptions and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their ratings. The additional services are bundled features within those plans and do not correspond to separate rated items. The total budget is a summary, not a rated option.
